reflection.candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>=80%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0, treat the signal as UNVALIDATED and freeze — conviction without historical pattern confirmation is unproven direction, not tradeable edge.
reflection.mechanism: green_matches=0 means the current live indicator configuration has never been seen paired with a winning outcome in memory; conviction only measures agreement among indicators at this instant, not whether that agreement historically resolved profitably. USDJPY today shows the trap: conv=100% LONG but hist_hr=0% — a fresh, untested consensus that safe-haven flow (L8) can corrupt. Institutional rate-signal reliability degrades exactly when indicators cluster without historical precedent, because clustering often reflects a crowded one-way positioning about to mean-revert.
reflection.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.80 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr <= 0.10: veto_entry() # require at least one historical green_match before trusting high-conviction direction

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
